title: aleuritia khasiana
intro: Aleuritia khasiana is a plant species native to the Eastern Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent, commonly known as the 'Khasan plant' or 'Bhotia'. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Aleuritia khasiana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, while also providing relief from pain and inflammation. Aleuritia khasiana is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by boiling its roots or leaves, which are rich in active compounds like alkaloids and glycosides.
